ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signal_data" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal data entry */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telescope where the data was collected */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the raw data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., FITS, HDF5) */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the signal data */,
  "frequency_resolution" REAL /* Frequency resolution of the signal data */,
  "time_resolution" REAL /* Time resolution of the signal data */,
  "polarization_mode" TEXT /* Polarization mode of the signal data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescopes" (
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telescope */,
  "telescope_name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the telescope */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the telescope */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the telescope dish */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Frequency range of the telescope */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the telescope */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Feed type of the telescope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of signal features */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data entry */,
  "mean_integrated_profile" REAL /* Mean of the integrated profile */,
  "std_dev_integrated_profile" REAL /* Standard deviation of the integrated profile */,
  "excess_kurtosis_integrated_profile" REAL /* Excess kurtosis of the integrated profile */,
  "skewness_integrated_profile" REAL /* Skewness of the integrated profile */,
  "mean_dmsnr_curve" REAL /* Mean of the DM-SNR curve */,
  "std_dev_dmsnr_curve" REAL /* Standard deviation of the DM-SNR curve */,
  "excess_kurtosis_dmsnr_curve" REAL /* Excess kurtosis of the DM-SNR curve */,
  "skewness_dmsnr_curve" REAL /* Skewness of the DM-SNR curve */,
  "target_class" INTEGER /* Target class (0 for non-pulsar, 1 for pulsar) */,
  "signal_to_noise_ratio" REAL /* Signal to noise ratio of the signal */,
  "frequency_drift_rate" REAL /* Frequency drift rate of the signal */,
  "pulse_width" REAL /* Pulse width of the signal */,
  "period" REAL /* Period of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_features_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signal_data ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., RandomForest, SVM, NeuralNetwork) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the trained model file */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for prediction */,
  "predicted_class" INTEGER /* Predicted class (0 for non-pulsar, 1 for pulsar) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_probability" REAL /* Probability of the predicted class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signal_data ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_preprocessing" (
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessing task */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data entry */,
  "preprocessing_type" TEXT /* Type of preprocessing (e.g., normalization, filtering) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for preprocessing */,
  "preprocessing_date" TEXT /* Date the preprocessing was performed */,
  "output_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the preprocessed data file */,
  "preprocessing_status" TEXT /* Status of the preprocessing task (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preprocessing_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signal_data ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., phone number, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, preprocess, predict) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., signal, model) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES signal_data ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., data analysis, model performance) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "member_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the project members (comma-separated) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_tags" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data entry */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag or label associated with the signal */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used for evaluation (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "evaluation_results" TEXT /* Results of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "evaluation_date")
)
